sync_notes:
Already up to date.
From https://github.com/D-sorganization/Programmatic-PID
 * branch            main       -> FETCH_HEAD

category_grades.name: Architecture and Boundaries
category_grades.notes: Assesses source organization and boundary clarity from tracked first-party layout.

category_grades.name: Build and Dependency Management
category_grades.notes: Assesses committed build, dependency, and tool configuration.

category_grades.name: Configuration and Environment Hygiene
category_grades.notes: Checks whether runtime and developer configuration is explicit.

category_grades.name: Contracts, Types, and Domain Modeling
category_grades.notes: Design by Contract evidence includes validation, assertions, typed models, explicit raised errors, and invariants.

category_grades.name: Reliability and Error Handling
category_grades.notes: Reliability is graded from test presence plus explicit validation/error-handling signals.

category_grades.name: Function, Module Size, and SRP
category_grades.notes: Evaluates function size, script/module size, and single responsibility using static size signals.

category_grades.name: Testing and TDD Posture
category_grades.notes: TDD history cannot be confirmed statically; grade reflects committed automated test posture.

category_grades.name: CI/CD and Automation
category_grades.notes: Checks for tracked CI/CD workflow files.

category_grades.name: Security and Secret Hygiene
category_grades.notes: Secret scan is regex-based; findings require manual confirmation.

category_grades.name: Documentation and Onboarding
category_grades.notes: Checks docs, README, onboarding, and release documents.

category_grades.name: Maintainability, DRY, and Duplication
category_grades.notes: DRY is assessed through duplicate filename clusters and TODO/FIXME density as static heuristics.

category_grades.name: API Surface and Law of Demeter
category_grades.notes: Law of Demeter is approximated with deep member-chain hints; confirmed violations require semantic review.

category_grades.name: Observability and Operability
category_grades.notes: Checks for logging, metrics, monitoring, and operational artifacts.

category_grades.name: Governance, Licensing, and Release Hygiene
category_grades.notes: Checks ownership, release, contribution, security, and license metadata.

key_risks: No high-confidence systemic risk surfaced by this static assessment.
recommendations: Keep assessment current and add deeper semantic review for Law of Demeter and contract coverage.

coverage.static_limits: TDD workflow history and confirmed Law of Demeter semantics require deeper review.
